title: Blue Fruit Ceramic Table Lamp
description:
Frutta blu means blue fruit, and this lamp takes its name from the deep blue and yellow palette of its ceramic base. Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare shape the amphora-style body on the wheel, paint it freehand, fire it, and we top it with a pleated fabric shade.

The base is a traditional two-handled amphora shape — a wide belly tapering to a narrow neck, with two curving cobalt blue handles on either side. The body is painted with large, bold fruit: lemons, pomegranates cut open to show the seeds, bunches of grapes, and green leaves. The upper portion has a warm yellow background that transitions into deep cobalt blue toward the bottom, with the fruit arranged across both areas. A scalloped golden border decorates the shoulder, and the base sits on a yellow foot with a blue edge. The ivory pleated shade has a braided trim and a classic bell shape.

The amphora form gives this lamp good height and presence. It suits a living room side table, a hallway console, or a large bedroom. The light comes through the shade soft and warm.

Every lamp is painted by hand, one at a time. The fruit arrangement follows the same general pattern, but each piece has its own small differences in brushwork and colour intensity. The shade is included.
excerpt: An amphora-shaped ceramic table lamp with hand-painted fruit on blue and yellow, pleated shade. Made in Vietri sul Mare.
